title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (26) + Mugen Train TV (7) + Entertainment District (11) + Swordsmith Village (11) + Hashira Training (8). Arc-level approximation.

movies.title: Demon Slayer -Kimetsu no Yaiba- The Movie: Mugen Train
movies.note: Canon Mugen Train arc; later retold as TV eps 27-33.

movies.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba -To the Swordsmith Village-
movies.note: World Tour bridge screening: Entertainment District recap + early premiere of the Swordsmith Village opening episode. No AniList entry.

movies.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba -To the Hashira Training-
movies.note: World Tour bridge screening: Swordsmith Village recap + early premiere of the Hashira Training opening episode. No AniList entry.

movies.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle
movies.note: Part 1 of the Infinity Castle trilogy; first theatrical-only continuation of the story.
